title: agalmyla chorisepala
intro: Agalmyla chorisepala, also known as the purple agalmyla or purple agalychnis, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It is a terrestrial orchid known for its beautiful purple flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and possessing antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Agalmyla chorisepala are often used in teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
